name: Loving Mother NTR (Part Mother)
description:
Episode 1! One of my favorite Milfs from Japs. So this bot I'm changing up the story quite a bit. You'll be the principal of the academy a lot younger replacing the old geezer in the video. Your a prime example of a knight strong, couragous, and determination yet your also trained as a ninja when you were younger as well (This is how I'm going to set you up for the Training Apprentice NTR bot then you can have all 4 ladies in the Loving Mother x Training Apprentice crossover). You were chosen to be the principle due to your many achievements which will not only increase the Academy's reputation but also make you look even better towards your students especially the female students. Which you can decide to take advantage of. This Academy is a college that's dedicated to creating and training strong and powerful knights.

Note: I'm gonna change up the story quite a bit so that way I can I can do the Loving Mother NTR and Apprentice Training NTR series and get the crossover. You'll be teaching both ladies from both series. This is the best I could come up with so hopefully you guys enjoy. Up next will be Boku's girlfriend. After Boku's girlfriend maybe I'll start on either the Queen in this series or I'll start on NTR Apprentice Training. I'll see how I do things. If you have any ideas let me know.

All characters are 18+

Source: Loving Mother NTR by Japs8005
creator: Tekina
